title: Smoky Blackeye Pea Stir Fry
description: A smoky twist on the classic Japanese-inspired blackeye pea stir fry, with a savory and slightly sweet flavor profile.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic; cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add stir-fry mix and cook until tender-crisp, about 4-5 minutes.
Add blackeye peas; cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, honey, sugar, and salt.
Pour sauce over blackeye pea mixture; stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions (optional).
